summary: W859 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while feeding the W832 target-ExactAt left-calculus route from the same W725/W519 closedness branch used by the W856 endpoint route. It derives W696 closed-range endpoint topology from W725 closedness plus three endpoint ExactAt topology facts, then uses W785 target ExactAt payload and W721 localized-right-adjoint data to reuse W832 for direct bounded left calculus and the stable package. Product success remains false because concrete route inputs, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W859 derives W696 closed-range-provider data from the W725/W519 closedness branch, but still requires a matched W725 closedness branch, endpoint ExactAt topology facts, W785 target ExactAt payload, W721 localized-right-adjoint data, finite limits, finite colimits, pretriangulated, and triangulated data.

The W856 homology-free selected-cochain provider is still not concretely instantiated; its boundary, relation, target-surjective/compact, closedness branch, normalized target, source triangulation, endpoint facts, and localized-right-adjoint fields remain open.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The review packet still does not expose the immutable-contract negative fixtures, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or prove one concrete W859 input next, preferably endpoint ExactAt topology facts, the W785 target ExactAt payload, a matched W725 closedness branch, or the W721 localized-right-adjoint provider.
Connect the W859 route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
